title: Unequal One-Sided Graph Limits
text: A two-sided limit exists only when both one-sided limits exist and are equal.

title: Sketch Each Side Separately
text: Graph the left-hand piece and right-hand piece on the same axes. Then compare the height the graph approaches from each side of $$x=3$$.

title: Left-Side Reading
text: What value does the graph approach from the left of $$x=3$$?

title: Right-Side Reading
text: What value does the graph approach from the right of $$x=3$$?

title: Compare the Two Sides
text: A two-sided limit exists only if the left-hand and right-hand graph values match.
